summary: Iteration 80 - Tested P0/P1 features: AI Stock Reorder page, Enhanced P&L page, Zustand branchStore integration across pages, and navigation sidebar updates. All features working correctly.

console_warnings.warning: HTML nesting warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span>
console_warnings.note: This is a React hydration warning from Emergent development tooling wrapper spans, not a functional issue

critical_code_review_comments: AI Stock Reorder page correctly implements 3 tabs: Reorder Suggestions, Smart Alerts, Demand Forecast
Enhanced P&L page correctly implements 4 tabs: By Branch, Monthly Trend, By Supplier, By Item
Both new pages properly integrate with useBranchStore for branch filtering
Navigation sidebar correctly shows 'AI Reorder' under Stock and 'Enhanced P&L' under Reports
Dark mode toggle using uiStore works correctly
All tested pages (Customers, POS, Suppliers, Expenses, Sales, Dashboard) load correctly with Zustand stores
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0/P1 features fully tested. AI Stock Reorder shows items needing reorder with AI-calculated suggestions. Enhanced P&L provides comprehensive profit/loss analysis with breakdowns. Both pages use Zustand branchStore for filtering.

tabs.reorder_suggestions: WORKING - Table with item details, urgency, suggested qty
tabs.smart_alerts: WORKING - AI-powered alerts with 'Out of stock' warning for Widget A
tabs.demand_forecast: WORKING - 14-day forecast section displays (empty due to limited data)

tabs.by_branch: WORKING - Bar chart + table with branch P&L data
tabs.monthly_trend: WORKING - Area chart showing sales/expenses/profit trends
tabs.by_supplier: WORKING - Horizontal bar chart + table with supplier expenses
tabs.by_item: WORKING - Item-wise P&L with export buttons (PDF/Excel)

filters.period_filter: WORKING - This Month, Last 3 Months, Last 12 Months options

zustand_integration_other_pages.dashboard_page: WORKING - User name 'SSC Admin' from authStore, branch filters visible
zustand_integration_other_pages.customers_page: WORKING - Page loads with customers table, uses branchStore
zustand_integration_other_pages.pos_page: WORKING - Branch dropdown visible with 'Test Branch' selected

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/enhanced_pnl_page.png - Enhanced P&L main view (By Supplier tab)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real backend calls
